entries.title: Critical Nginx UI auth bypass flaw now actively exploited in the wild
entries.summary: A critical vulnerability in Nginx UI with Model Context Protocol (MCP) support is now being exploited in the wild for full server takeover without authentication. [...]

entries.title: New AgingFly malware used in attacks on Ukraine govt, hospitals
entries.summary: A new malware family named 'AgingFly' has been identified in attacks against local governments and hospitals that steal authentication data from Chromium-based browsers and WhatsApp messenger. [...]

entries.title: WordPress plugin suite hacked to push malware to thousands of sites
entries.summary: More than 30 WordPress plugins in the EssentialPlugin package have been compromised with malicious code that allows unauthorized access to websites running them. [...]

entries.title: Signed software abused to deploy antivirus-killing scripts
entries.summary: A digitally signed adware tool has deployed payloads running with SYSTEM privileges that disabled antivirus protections on thousands of endpoints, some in the educational, utilities, government, and healthcare sectors. [...]

entries.title: Microsoft pays $2.3M for cloud and AI flaws at Zero Day Quest
entries.summary: Microsoft has awarded $2.3 million to security researchers after receiving nearly 700 submissions during this year's Zero Day Quest hacking contest. [...]

entries.title: CISA flags Windows Task Host vulnerability as exploited in attacks
entries.summary: CISA warned U.S. government agencies to secure their systems against a Windows Task Host privilege escalation vulnerability that could allow attackers to gain SYSTEM privileges. [...]

entries.title: Rolling Networks: Securing the Transportation Sector
entries.summary: Modern trucks are rolling networks packed with sensors, connectivity, and attack surfaces, creating new cyber risks. NMFTA's Cybersecurity Conference brings industry leaders together to tackle emerging threats in transportation. [...]

entries.title: Microsoft: April updates trigger BitLocker key prompts on some servers
entries.summary: Microsoft confirmed on Tuesday that some Windows Server 2025 devices will boot into BitLocker recovery after installing the April 2026 KB5082063 Windows security update. [...]

entries.title: Microsoft fixes bug behind Windows Server 2025 automatic upgrades
entries.summary: Microsoft has finally fixed a known issue that was causing systems running Windows Server 2019 and 2022 to "unexpectedly" upgrade to Windows Server 2025. [...]

entries.title: Microsoft adds Windows protections for malicious Remote Desktop files
entries.summary: Microsoft has introduced new Windows protections to defend against phishing attacks that abuse Remote Desktop connection (.rdp) files, adding warnings and disabling risky shared resources by default. [...]

entries.title: Crypto-exchange Kraken extorted by hackers after insider breach
entries.summary: The Kraken cryptocurrency exchange announced that a cybercrime group is trying to extort the company by threatening to release videos showing internal systems that host client data. [...]

entries.title: Over 100 Chrome Web Store extensions steal user accounts, data
entries.summary: More than 100 malicious extensions in the official Chrome Web Store are attempting to steal Google OAuth2 Bearer tokens, deploy backdoors, and carry out ad fraud. [...]

entries.title: Microsoft releases Windows 10 KB5082200 extended security update
entries.summary: Microsoft has released the Windows 10 KB5082200 extended security update to fix the April 2026 Patch Tuesday vulnerabilities, including 2 zero-days. [...]

entries.title: McGraw-Hill confirms data breach following extortion threat
entries.summary: Education company McGraw-Hill has confirmed in a statement to BleepingComputer that hackers exploited a Salesforce misconfiguration and accessed its internal data. [...]

entries.title: Windows 11 cumulative updates KB5083769 & KB5082052 released
entries.summary: Microsoft has released Windows 11 KB5083769 and KB5082052 cumulative updates for versions 25H2/24H2 and 23H2 to fix security vulnerabilities, bugs, and add new features. [...]
